name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
🤖 StandupBot helps distributed teams run asynchronous daily standups.

🔧 Create a team and add members.
📊 Run standups — members answer questions privately.
📋 View history of past standups.

Tap /start to open the menu — everything is reachable by tapping.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
